CustomField.description: System-managed lifecycle indicator surfaced on the Experience Cloud portal. Set by automation at each processing stage: Pending GIS when the record is created and GIS proximity check is queued; Pending CE Screening when GIS completes and CE screener is queued; Ready for Review when CE screening recommendation is written; Error when any automated step fails. Allows coordinators and applicants to see where the application is in the automated pipeline without accessing internal Salesforce records.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Current automated processing stage. Set by workflow — do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Processing Status
